overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a character paddling a canoe down a winding wilderness river. The journey traverses diverse natural terrain from waterfall pools through rocky canyons to open mountain valleys, ending at a waterfall precipice.

events.description: beginning at waterfall location with water cascading down rock face
turning canoe away from waterfall to head downstream

agents.ego_description: paddling the canoe away from the waterfall and into the downstream current

entered.detail: rocky cliff with flowing water cascading down into the river
dense green trees lining the left riverbank
dense green trees lining the right riverbank

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the base of a waterfall in a natural pool, surrounded by dense forest canopy on both banks. The character paddles the canoe away from the cascading water and turns downstream, entering the main river current.

events.description: navigating past large boulder formation in the river channel

agents.ego_description: steadily paddling downstream past rocky outcrops and boulders

entered.detail: massive gray rock formation rising from the water on the left side
steep rocky terrain rising above the left bank

segments.scene_description: The canoe travels down a winding river section dotted with large boulders. The waterfall recedes behind as the river narrows slightly, with rocky cliffs emerging on the left bank and dense forest continuing on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow river canyon with steep rock walls

events.description: entering narrow canyon section with high rock walls on both sides

agents.ego_description: paddling through the confined canyon passage with high walls

entered.detail: tall steep rock wall rising directly from the water on the left
tall steep rock wall rising directly from the water on the right

segments.scene_description: The river enters a narrow canyon with steep rock walls rising on both sides, creating an enclosed passage. The dense forest gives way to sparse vegetation on the cliff tops as the canoe navigates through the confined waterway.

scene_state.functional_zone: open river valley with mountain backdrop

events.description: exiting narrow canyon into wide open valley with expansive views
distant snow-capped mountains become visible on the horizon

agents.ego_description: paddling through the widening river with scenic mountain views ahead

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the distance
individual pine trees dotting the riverbanks
rocky shoreline with boulders on the right side

segments.scene_description: Exiting the canyon, the river opens into a wide valley with expansive views of distant snow-capped mountains. The riverbanks feature scattered pine trees and rocky outcrops as the canoe continues downstream through the scenic landscape.

events.description: slowing approach to waterfall precipice at the end of the river section
reaching the waterfall drop-off edge with view of lower canyon below

agents.ego_description: paddling to the waterfall edge and stopping at the precipice

entered.detail: sharp drop-off where the river ends in a waterfall
view of the river continuing below the waterfall drop

segments.scene_description: The canoe approaches the end of the navigable river section, reaching a waterfall edge. The character stops at the precipice, overlooking the lower canyon and river visible below the drop-off, with the mountain range now visible to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a canoe travels from the secluded base of a waterfall through a tightening canyon and into an expansive mountain valley. It begins in a natural pool surrounded by a dense forest canopy, moving away from the cascading water to enter the main river current. As the canoe winds downstream past large boulders, the forest on the right bank persists while rocky cliffs emerge on the left, eventually closing in to form a narrow canyon with steep rock walls and sparse vegetation. The scene then opens into a wide valley with scattered pine trees and sweeping views of distant snow-capped mountains before the river reaches a final precipice. The journey concludes at the waterfall edge, overlooking the lower canyon and the river below with the mountain range stretching out to the left.
